summary: Shipping AI features and design-system migrations across Optimizely's Content Marketing Platform. De-facto sign-off owner for design-system migrations and AI-tracking instrumentation.

bullets.d: Drove the platform's multi-year migration from a legacy in-house design library to the OptiAxiom design system, authoring React/TypeScript adapter components and leading component migrations. Authored internal migration documentation adopted across product teams.
Led the Axiom V3 rollout including resolving a critical micro-frontend architecture issue; migrated the color token system and key UI components.

Owned end-to-end integration of an AI integration SDK — migrated the backend service to a modern framework, designed the internal package publishing pipeline, built the permissions layer and test suite, and authored internal documentation that graduated the feature from beta to GA.
Built a reusable event-tracking React hook and instrumented structured AI-context events across multiple product surfaces.
Implemented backend context extraction for LLM prompts, frontend block form interaction, and AI resource rendering for the platform's AI document interface.

Centralized fragmented per-feature status indicators into a unified StatusBadge component backed by a shared server-side schema across campaigns, tasks, and milestones; surfaced in global Spotlight search.
Resolved duplicate comment/task creation on rapid clicks (server + client), fixed duplicate in-app notifications, refactored Dark Mode to CSS variables, and added 8 missing i18n locale variants.
Reviewed 300+ pull requests across multiple repositories.

summary: Worked under Dr. Denys Poshyvanyk on intelligent software tools — building NLP infrastructure for SE-specific code understanding.

bullets.d: Built a programming language-specific tokenizer to improve NLP model predictions for software engineering tasks, contributing to the lab's research on intelligent software tools.

summary: Full-stack engineering on internal tooling and a real-time stock-data integration.

bullets.d: Built custom graphs and advanced data filters to enhance reporting capabilities.
Designed and implemented a TradeStation API integration for real-time stock price data; deployed on Azure using .NET.
